prose.overview: DUPLICATE BLOCKER: Stage 3 verification confirms The Royal Chiangmai Golf Resort is the same course as entry #4 (Royal Chiang Mai Golf Club & Resort). Both entries reference royalchiangmai.com, the same Peter Thomson 1996 design, the same Mae Faek address, and the same phone number. This entry should not be published as a separate page. Pipeline owner should either remove this slug or confirm that a second distinct Royal Chiang Mai course exists. Prose from entry #4 applies if confirmed duplicate.
prose.tips: See entry #4. Confirm at royalchiangmai.com or +66 52 081 995.
prose.location_and_access: Mae Faek, San Sai District, approximately 40 kilometres north of Chiang Mai city and 40 minutes from CNX airport. Visitors from Bangkok fly (approximately 1 hour 10 minutes) — driving 700 km not practical.
prose.rental_cta_context: Playing The Royal Chiangmai Golf Resort? Rent premium clubs in Bangkok — delivered to your hotel before you fly — so you arrive ready to play without airline baggage fees.
